description: Verify GUI canvas edits use draft revisions, validation, confirmed activation, node context, and runtime controls.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" project-create --project p1 --name 'Project One' --agents pm,coder >/dev/null; "$office" agent-invoke --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role project_manager --project p1 --agent coder --task 'Implement canvas contract' --run-id canvas-run --task-id canvas-task > "$tmp/direct.json"; "$office" workflow-draft-create --run-id canvas-run --created-by manager --role project_manager --revision-id invalid-draft >/dev/null; "$office" workflow-draft-patch --run-id canvas-run --revision-id invalid-draft --updated-by manager --role project_manager --patch-json '{"operations":[{"op":"remove_node","node_id":"final-output"}]}' > "$tmp/invalid-patch.json"; "$office" workflow-draft-validate --run-id canvas-run --revision-id invalid-draft > "$tmp/invalid-validate.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["validation"]["status"] == "invalid"' "$tmp/invalid-validate.json"; set +e; "$office" workflow-draft-activate --run-id canvas-run --revision-id invalid-draft --activated-by manager --role project_manager --confirmed > "$tmp/invalid-activate.json" 2> "$tmp/invalid-activate.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" workflow-draft-create --run-id canvas-run --created-by manager --role project_manager --revision-id draft-1 >/dev/null; "$office" workflow-draft-patch --run-id canvas-run --revision-id draft-1 --updated-by manager --role project_manager --patch-json '{"operations":[{"op":"add_node","node":{"node_id":"approval-1","type":"approval_gate","title":"Approval"}},{"op":"remove_edge","from":"agent-1-coder","to":"final-output"},{"op":"add_edge","from":"agent-1-coder","to":"approval-1"},{"op":"add_edge","from":"approval-1","to":"final-output"}]}' > "$tmp/valid-patch.json"; "$office" workflow-draft-activate --run-id canvas-run --revision-id draft-1 --activated-by manager --role project_manager --confirmed > "$tmp/activate.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["active_revision_id"] == "draft-1" and data["validation"]["status"] == "valid"' "$tmp/activate.json"; "$office" workflow-node-context --run-id canvas-run --node-id agent-1-coder > "$tmp/context.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["active_revision_id"] == "draft-1" and "approval-1" in data["downstream_node_ids"]' "$tmp/context.json"; set +e; "$office" workflow-node-context --run-id canvas-run --node-id agent-1-coder --revision-id stale > "$tmp/stale.json" 2> "$tmp/stale.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" workflow-control --run-id canvas-run --action pause --requested-by manager --role project_manager > "$tmp/pause.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "paused_after_current_node"' "$tmp/pause.json"; "$office" workflow-control --run-id canvas-run --action resume --requested-by manager --role project_manager > "$tmp/resume.json"; set +e; "$office" workflow-control --run-id canvas-run --action stop --requested-by manager --role project_manager > "$tmp/stop-denied.json" 2> "$tmp/stop-denied.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" workflow-control --run-id canvas-run --action stop --requested-by manager --role project_manager --confirmed > "$tmp/stop.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "stopped"' "$tmp/stop.json"
